purpose: Learned state for the paper-trading system. The daily trader READS this before trading. The weekly review WRITES to it. Bounded self-adjustment only.

adjustment_limits.note: The review may pause a source (multiplier 0) or scale it up to 2x base size.

congress_default.status: SHADOW_ONLY (post-2012 edge ≈ zero; all sources blocked 16+ consecutive trading days)

macro_rules.risk_off_definition: VIX > 25 OR major war/escalation OR circuit-breaker OR Fed emergency

quality_gate.philosophy: Buffett-style: only buy businesses, not tickers.

investment_committee.purpose: Six lenses, one-line votes per member. Net-positive required. Munger pure-hype rejection counts double.

members.Peter Lynch: Understand in one sentence? Growth reasonable for price?

overfitting_guard.rule: No multiplier change justified by <5 graded samples. If graded sample count <30, conclusions labeled LOW CONFIDENCE.

operational_details.corporate_action_check: Check news before >30% drops; adjust instead of sell if split/dividend
operational_details.signal_dedupe: Keep processed_signals fingerprints; never act twice on same disclosure
operational_details.dynamic_sizing: Base buy = 2% of current total portfolio value
operational_details.instrument_filter: Common stocks only; broad ETFs allowed
operational_details.earnings_proximity: Defer buys if earnings within 3 trading days

lessons.learning: Day 15 (Monday). ELV insider cluster buy executed post-macro and data scan. Portfolio repriced at 2026-07-20 close. AAPL 333.74 (+8.21% from 308.63 cost), AXP 355.35 (+0.96%), KO 81.56 (-3.10%), SPY 746.38 (intraday, likely close ~743-745), MTUM ~302 (est, -7% from cost). New position ELV 367.32 (@$0 unrealized, just filled). Portfolio composition shifting: 3 Berkshire (5.9% sleeve), 1 ELV (2.1% insider), 2 broad ETFs (48.6% SPY, 22.8% MTUM), 22.6% cash. Macro: NORMAL (VIX 17.92 <25, SPY above 200-DMA ~745, no crisis). Data: Congress blocked 14 days (shadow); insider clusters yielded 2 candidates (ELV PASS, VIRC FAIL on profitability). Confidence: MODERATE (macro calls 16/17 right; Berkshire 3 trades all positive unrealized, but sample noise; ELV brand-new fill, no track record).

Day 16 (Tuesday). Portfolio repriced post-weekend, ELV now +6.28% over 24 hours. AAPL continued strength (+6.52% from cost), AXP flat (-0.37%), KO weakness (-2.46%). SPY down 0.68% amid mixed earnings and volatility rise (VIX 17.14). MTUM momentum drag continues (-3.73%). Portfolio drawdown from peak now 3.03% (within pain limit). Macro: NORMAL regime holding despite VIX uptick; no new buys warranted. Congress still blocked (15+ days). Monday 13F resolution deferred pending user-agent retry. Insider cluster data: no new eligibles since ELV. Key insight: Factor entry timing remains problem; MTUM -3.73% is vol-scaled allocation executed at momentum peak (momentum oscillator RSI>70). Future discipline: add RSI <50 gate to momentum rebalance. Confidence: MODERATE (Berkshire +1.56% avg 16 days; ELV +6.28% 1 day; both positive, but early). Macro accuracy: 16/17 right, 1 wrong (2026-07-18). Still NORMAL regime by charter.
